Add this signature to Gmail

Two columns: PLAYERSTALL on the left; name / title / contacts / socials on the right. Same fonts and colors as the homepage headers (Oswald + Yantramanav, #0d0d0d / #8c8c8c) — no orange.

  1. Click Copy for Gmail, then in Gmail: Settings → See all settings → General → Signature, select all in the box, paste, Save changes.
  2. If copy fails, click inside the dashed box, Cmd+A / Ctrl+A, copy, then paste into Gmail.
  3. Do not use Insert image for the whole signature.

Fonts in email: The copied block includes embedded @font-face for Oswald and Yantramanav. Gmail may still substitute Arial on some clients. For a pixel-perfect match, export a PNG from the browser or design tool and use Gmail’s Insert image for the banner only, or keep this HTML for live links.

Preview (what you paste)

PLAYERSTALL  
Monika Brownova
ACCOUNT MANAGER
1 888 584 1444
